Actions.Text: REFERENCE CHANGED TO WAYS AND MEANS
ORDERED TO THIRD READING RULES CAL.624

Title: Permits Yates county assistant district attorneys and assistant public defenders to reside in Monroe county
Summary: Permits Yates county assistant district attorneys and assistant public defenders to reside in Monroe county.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the public officers law, in relation to permitting Yates county assistant district attorneys and assistant public defenders to reside in Monroe county
